bookmarks.title: Graft | AI Code Editor with Autonomous Coding Agents
bookmarks.excerpt: AI-native code editor where autonomous coding agents see your full codebase and work in parallel, each in their own git worktree.

bookmarks.title: jmux — The terminal workspace for agentic development
bookmarks.excerpt: Run AI coding agents in parallel. See which are working, which finished, which need review — all from your terminal.

bookmarks.title: Maestri · A new kind of terminal app
bookmarks.excerpt: Orchestrate multiple AI agents, terminals, sketches and notes on one infinite canvas. Built for macOS.

bookmarks.title: The advisor strategy: Give Sonnet an intelligence boost with Opus | Claude
bookmarks.excerpt: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor, and get Opus-level intelligence in your agents at a fraction of the cost.

bookmarks.title: Spacesuit — A futuristic canvas for your personal development
bookmarks.excerpt: Spacesuit is a blank slate. No templates, no preconception, just space for your ideas to take shape.
